component.name: MailBoxCleaner
component.summary: Move old IMAP messages to Thunderbird Local Folders

description.p: MailBoxCleaner connects to any IMAP server over SSL and moves messages older than a configurable threshold into Thunderbird's Local Folders in standard mbox format. It frees server storage quota without losing mail.

ul.li: Batch processing to avoid timeouts on large mailboxes
Dry-run mode to preview what would be archived
All options configurable via environment variables for scripting
Optional systemd user timer for fully automated, unattended archiving

description.p: Credentials are stored in a mode-600 environment file so the password is never visible in the process list or system logs.
